title: Totem of Undying Piccolo
description: This resource pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a custom pixel-art design of Piccolo.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1751ee9775b04c8e4e8ddd0abbae104fe3228a.png)

# 🟢 Dragon Ball Z Totem – Piccolo

Bring the wisdom and strength of **Piccolo** into your Minecraft survival.
This resource pack transforms the **Totem of Undying** into a custom pixel-art design of Piccolo, the Namekian warrior. Calm yet powerful, Piccolo’s totem form will keep you alive when danger strikes.

---

## ✨ Features

✔️ Custom **Totem of Undying** texture – Piccolo

✔️ Vanilla-friendly, no OptiFine required

✔️ Compatible across **Minecraft 1.8 → 1.21+**

✔️ Lightweight & safe for multiplayer use

✔️ Great for **Dragon Ball fans** who want a unique totem retexture

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Drop it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable in-game under **Resource Packs**.

---

## 📌 Notes

* Fan project inspired by Dragon Ball Z.
* All rights belong to the official creators.
